nasb.text: Then the king said to Joab, “Behold now, I will surely do this thing; go therefore, bring back the young man Absalom.”

esv.text: Then the king said to Joab, “Behold now, I grant this; go, bring back the young man Absalom.”

cnv.text: 王對約押說：“看哪！這事我已經同意了。你去把那年輕人押沙龍帶回來吧！”

ccb.text: 于是，王对约押说：“我答应你的请求，你去把年轻的押沙龙带回来吧。”
